vo_text: Born on July 18? Your card is the 10 of Clubs. In Cardology it's called The Master Builder. Treat it as a mirror, not a forecast. You're the intellectual master. Your mind is seasoned and capable. You're carrying forward accumulated wisdom, embodying and teaching integrated knowledge. Your gifts: intellectual mastery and deep expertise, ability to radiate confidence and competence, and wisdom from experience and reflection. You've thought deeply and built significantly. You have wisdom, authority, and accomplishment. The shadow side? You rest on your intellectual accomplishments and stop growing. You think you've figured it out, so you stop questioning. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.
title: Born July 18? Your Birth Card Is the 10 of Clubs #shorts
caption:
